# netbox_rir (Resource)

Manages a NetBox RIR (Regional Internet Registry).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the RIR.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the RIR.
- `is_private` (Boolean) Whether this RIR represents private address space.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug for the RIR. Auto-generated from name if not provided.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this RIR. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing RIR with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
